action_set_definitions.name: get_simulation_time
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current clock time of the simulation environment.

action_set_definitions.name: get_train_telemetry
action_set_definitions.description: Provides detailed real-time data for a specific train, including location, distance to specific waypoints, and Hours of Service (HOS) status.

target_waypoints.description: List of block IDs to calculate distance to.

action_set_definitions.name: get_infrastructure_details
action_set_definitions.description: Queries the status of specific track blocks, including occupancy, blockage clearance ETAs, and physical restrictions like weight limits.

block_ids.description: List of block IDs to inspect.

action_set_definitions.name: issue_dispatch_orders
action_set_definitions.description: Sets the operational parameters for a train, including its target speed and the specific sequence of blocks it is authorized to traverse.

target_speed_mph.description: The speed to maintain to hit arrival targets.

authorized_route.description: The ordered list of blocks the train is permitted to enter.

action_set_definitions.name: advance_simulation
action_set_definitions.description: Advances the environment clock by a specific number of minutes.

state_description.current_simulation_time: The current time in the simulation (HH:MM:SS)
state_description.trains: List of active trains and their current physical status
state_description.infrastructure_status: The status of tracks and signals
state_description.pending_conflicts: List of detected scheduling or safety conflicts
